text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "netsh.exe, spawned by powershell.exe, was used to add an inbound firewall rule allowing a python.exe executable located in a user's AppData directory to bypass the firewall. This is a common technique used by malware to establish persistence or facilitate command and control.",
  "indicators": [
    "netsh.exe",
    "advfirewall firewall add rule",
    "dir=in action=allow",
    "program=C:\\users\\wardog\\appdata\\local\\programs\\python\\python39\\python.exe",
    "powershell.exe parent process"
  ]
}
